top_signals.title: Stocks Drop With Bonds, Oil Rises on Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks and bonds fell while oil climbed after fresh attacks in the Middle East hurt optimism for a deal to end the war. The dollar gained.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australia sues 3M over ’forever chemical’ contamination near military bases
top_signals.summary: Canberra is seeking damages to recover the cost of managing environmental contamination at 28 military bases from per- and poly-fluoroalkyl substances (PFAS).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
